page.title: Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2502 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in %a.+$|1|1|false|%%NOMATCH%%}}|%%NOMATCH%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYY0s crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}|{{YYYY crimes in countryname category header/outer core|diagnose={{yesno-no|{{{diagnose}}}}}|country={{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}|lookupnationality={{GetAdjectiveFromCountryName|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^%d%d%d%d crimes in (%a.+)$|%1|1|false}}|^[tT]he ||1|false}}}}|parentcountry={{{parentcountry|}}}|nationalityparam={{{nationality|}}}|year={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^(%d%d%d%d) .+$|%1|1|false}}|continentparam1={{{continent1|}}}|continentparam2={{{continent2|}}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY crimes in countryname category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"YYYY crimes in countryname"}}, where "countryname" is the name of a country (e.g. "Latvia" or "the United States") and "YYYY" is a 4-digit year (e.g. "1937")}}}}{{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
